title: Application Engineer
description:
Role:

  • To support Sales in all technical and product promotion activities including but not limited to offer preparation, product selection, technical discussions, conducting trainings etc.
  • To act as a bridge between Sales & Engineering


Responsibilities:
Technical discussions and presentations

  • Participates Sales in technical discussions with customers for Projects, special engineered applications, competitor conversions, retrofits, upgrades etc.
  • Conducts presentations and customer trainings as and when required.

Offer Preparation & Product Selection*

  • Analyzes provided technical information to select an adequate solution for the customer‘s application, makes recommendations for mechanical seals and sealing systems.
  • Receives, reviews & processes inquiries/customer orders, ensures that technical specifications are in accordance with the offer.
  • Assists Sales in the promotion, selling and servicing of our products in the local market, consistent with the objectives of the company and the customer requirements.
  • Prepares technical proposals, reviews technical details of purchase orders, pump & seal datasheets and works closely with Sales & Service and Design departments, to keep the timeline.
  • Creation of technical drawings/draft.

Trouble-shooting assistance

  • Provide assistance in troubleshooting of seals & systems where additional expertise/help may be required by the Service team. (primary responsibility of trouble-shooting remains with Service)

Documentation

  • Develops and maintains installed-base lists, case-studies, success stories and presentations.

Qualifications

  • Diploma in Engineering OR Bachelor`s degree in Engineering
  • Knowledge of sealing technologies and its associated equipment
  • Understanding the selection of mechanical seals for different applications
  • Good inter-personal skills
  • Good presentation skills
  • Good analytical skills
  • Good intercultural understanding across countries, good English language skills, willing for local and international business trips

Preferred:

  • 3+ years of experience in rotating equipment
  • Advanced knowledge in mechanical sealing technology
  • Good exposure to competitor products
  • Exposure to trouble-shooting
  • Strong communication skills and a Team-player mindset
  • Excellent convincing skills and pleasant personality with a constructive technical sales approach, brings solutions on the table to help resolve & retain difficult customers
  • Proficiency in Microsoft office programs, Word, Excel, Teams, ppt and Outlook.
  • Experience with SAP software

postedCompany.description:
We are a world-leading provider of sealing solutions with operations worldwide. Our company produces engineered mechanical seals for pumps, agitators and compressors, static seals and diaphragm couplings.


Location: 164 Gul Circle
postedCompany.name: EAGLEBURGMANN SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
